title: Mission Report Ep. 03 | Antigravity Updates
summary: Google Antigravity is an agentic development platform that evolves the IDE into an agent-first era. Agents operate autonomously across the editor, terminal, and browser to plan and execute complex end-to-end tasks in software development. The platform enables developers to work at a task-oriented level while managing agents across workspaces.
